title: WolfTpmLinuxDev::open callable without linux-dev feature with no clear diagnostic
description: WolfTpmLinuxDev and its open() method exist unconditionally (no #[cfg(feature='linux-dev')]). The 'linux-dev' feature only controls whether wolfTPM is compiled with '--enable-devtpm'. Without it, wolfTPM may autodetect or fail at runtime with an opaque wolfTPM internal error code. Users who create WolfTpmLinuxDev without the linux-dev feature will file issues about cryptic wolfTPM errors. The struct's doc says 'Linux kernel TPM driver' but is silently functional-but-wrong without the feature. Maintenance consequence: recurring user confusion.
